ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "id_code" TEXT /* Identifier for the sample */,
  "po_ug_l" REAL /* Concentration of phosphorus in micrograms per liter */,
  "no2n_ug_l" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen oxides in micrograms per liter */,
  "nn_ug_l" REAL /* Concentration of nitrate nitrogen in micrograms per liter */,
  "nh4_ug_l" REAL /* Concentration of ammonium nitrogen in micrograms per liter */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during collection */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample collected in liters */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., geographical coordinates) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of water body */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical parameter (e.g., PO, NO2) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "lower_limit" REAL /* Lower limit of the acceptable concentration range */,
  "upper_limit" REAL /* Upper limit of the acceptable concentration range */,
  "critical_level" REAL /* Concentration level that indicates a critical situation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or information about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the method in percentage */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Precision of the method */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for the method */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or information about the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being analyzed */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis in JSON format */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "quality_check" INTEGER /* Indicates if a quality check was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or information about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sample */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample to which the metadata belongs */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the sample was collected in Celsius */,
  "pH_level" REAL /* pH level of the sample */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water sample in practical salinity units */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water sample in NTU */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen in the water sample in mg/L */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity of the water sample in μS/cm */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or information about the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of changes made in this version in JSON format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
